reviews.review_title: Good game but over too soon
reviews.review_description:
My son played this literally within a few days, as it was over the Christmas break, however there doesn't appear to be any more eggs to break.
Are there any plans to update or any options to purchase more?  Feel a bit annoyed that it appears to be the end of the game. 
Please advise.
Good
We need to get it brand new update for more egg
Once you beat it, there is no more content
I beat the game in half a day. Honestly thought there was more after you finish all the eggs. Maybe a level system. It’s a very fun idea. But once all done. It’s not worth spending the price….

I was just casually playing and then ￼ I got to the last egg that was showing up, but it was the wood one, but the wood shelf was already full, and I looked at the wood shelf and it had two of the same guy so every time I will finish the wood one it would just sit there at the pad that wouldn’t get launched to the shelf  so can you guys please fix that? I know it’s early access but please ￼

Ok, I know this game is still in early access, but I got some thoughts. It’s a solid game, it gives you enough to work with to spend a good amount of time on. That being said, here’s some things I think should be added:

- A trash can: you cannot delete any of the stickers you pull out, they rest on your table for the end of time, or until you use them.

- a way to turn the stickers: there’s a lot of eye stickers that only go one way! They look bad!! If I could mirror them, that would be amazing!!

- the gatcha for the stickers needs some work: it’s annoying, but bearable to gradually get different stickers. But there’s a bug that I incounter that if you don’t open a new pack after every figure, it doesn’t give you new ones. It goes into the default “no more stuff to get” mouth. 

- being able to recustomize the figures: now. I haven’t reached the end yet, but if the back wall is still locked, I’m very close. So I’m sorry if it’s a thing you can do after you unlock all the figures. That being said, *please let us redecorate them*. There’s tons!!! Tons!!!!!! Of times where you do the slightest misclick and the sticker goes on wonky and wrong! There’s no going back to it, so you’re stuck with a worse standard. Let alone, when you unlock better stickers along the way, you can’t use them on the older ones!! Please make it so we can undo/ redecorate them!!

- Clipping: so, the stickers also clip through the figure in different areas. Example being, that I put a sticker on a pizza box that a figure was holding, it ends up clipping onto the torso as well. So not only does the pizza box has the sticker, but the figure’s main body does as well. The only thing that seems to not clip through on the regular, is the “face” and “back” of the head and the main body. But even with the main body, there’s still some areas on certain figures where it will clip through.

All in all though, if you are just going to give this to a kid, they aren’t going to mind too much, unless they are very particular where things go. For an adult on the other hand? You have to be prepared for the wonkiness of it all. I started the game with the best intentions of making aesthetic stuff, but at this point it’s easier to make them very creepy/ chaotic looking.
It's really a cute game.  Once you have done all that they have it just stops.  I'm Hoping they are still working on this game and not just going to leave as is.
I got through it in an hour
My daughter got bored straight away

reviews.review_title: Fun game but no more eggs
reviews.review_description:
Sweet fun game however once you’re out of eggs there is nothing to do. Obviously this is in development so I suspect more will end up added 
Would also be good to have a quick way to reset the game to replay the eggs that they do have. 
Will update to higher stars with updates

developer_response.body: Hey! Thank you for the review! For sure, the update is coming soon! We will add the option to reset the collections in future! We appreciate your suggestion! :)

reviews.review_description:
Hi I’ve tried to find support but couldn’t find any link. 

My daughter has bought many of your games but this is the first which has stopped working. I’ve tried uninstalling but it does the same thing…

When she makes a toy “it doesn’t send it to the shelf anymore and all the stickers won’t come out” if that makes any sense!?

*UPDATE* i didn’t hear from support. 2 weeks later i managed to figure it out. go to settings > storage > library and you can clear game data.
